mapper.select: Select ESTP.ESTypeCode, ESTP.ItemTypeCode, ESTP.MenuID, ESTP.ProcessID, ESTP.VarFilter, ESTP.DocCategory, TM.URL AS ESTypeUrl, ESTP.ManagerID AS ESManagerID, ESTP.MgtGRID AS ESMgtGRID, MBR.TeamID AS ESMgtTeamID, ESTP.DefARC AS DefArcCode, ESTP.DefTempl AS DefTemplCode From XBOLTAPP.ESM_ES_TYPE ESTP Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MENU TM ON TM.MenuID = ESTP.MenuID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER MBR ON MBR.MemberID = ESTP.ManagerID Where ESTypeCode = #{esTypeCode}

Select EST.SRTypeCode, EST.ItemTypeCode, EST.MenuID, EST.ProcModelID, EST.VarFilter, EST.WFDocURL, EST.WFAprvURL, EST.DocCategory, EST.EvalTypeCode, EST.DefWFID, EST.ItemProposal, TM.URL AS SRTypeUrl, EST.ManagerID, EST.MgtGRID, MBR.TeamID, EST.DefARC AS DefArcCode, EST.DefTempl AS DefTemplCode From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_TYPE EST Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MENU TM ON TM.MenuID = EST.MenuID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER MBR ON MBR.MemberID = EST.ManagerID Where SRTypeCode = #{srTypeCode}

Select TE.ElementID AS StatusCode, TIA.PlainText AS StatusName, TE.SortNum, TE.CategoryCode From XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT TE LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TIA.ItemID = TE.ObjectID And TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} Where TE.ModelID = #{procPathID} And TE.CategoryCode = 'MOJ' Order By TE.SortNum ASC
mapper.insert: Insert Into XBOLTAPP.ESM_ITMP_MST( SRID, SRType, ItemID, ParentID, Description, ProposalType, Status, ProposerID, ProposerTeamID, CreationTime, LastUpdated, LastUser )Values( #{srID}, #{srType}, #{srArea3}, #{parentID}, #{description}, #{proposalType}, #{status}, #{proposerID}, #{proposerTeamID}, getdate(), getdate(), #{requestUserID} )
mapper.select: Select ISNULL(MAX(ITMPID),0)+1 From XBOLTAPP.ESM_ITMP_MST
Select TM.URL AS SRMenuURL From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_TYPE TRT Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MENU TM ON TM.MenuID = TRT.MenuID Where SRTypeCode = #{srTypeCode}

Select Top 1000 Row_Number() OVER(ORDER BY TI.ItemTypeCode ASC, TI.Identifier ASC, TIA.PlainText ASC ) AS RNUM , 1 AS CHK , TI.Identifier , ISNULL(TIA.PlainText,'') As ItemNM , TDC.Name AS ClassName , TI.ClassCode , ISNULL(TM.Name,'') AS AuthorName , ISNULL(XBOLTADM.fn_GetMyAbsPathForList( TI.ItemID, #{languageID}),'') AS Path , TI.Status , TI.ItemID , TDS.Name AS StatusNM , Convert(nvarchar(20),TI.LastUpdated, 120) AS LastUpdated From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_Item_Attr TIA ON TIA.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TDC ON TDC.TypeCode = TI.ClassCode And TDC.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM ON TI.AuthorID = TM.MemberID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_CLASS TCLS ON TCLS.ItemClassCode = TI.ClassCode LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TDS ON TI.Status = TDS.TypeCode AND TDS.Category = 'ITMSTS' AND TDS.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_ITMP_MST TIP ON TI.ItemID = TIP.ItemID Where TI.Deleted != 1 AND TI.CategoryCode = 'OJ' AND TCLS.ChangeMgt = '1'
AND TIP.SRID = #{srID} And TIP.ItemID IS NOT NULL
And TI.ItemTypeCode = #{itemTypeCode}
And TI.itemID in (${itemIDs})
And TI.itemID not in (SELECT ItemID FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ITMP_MST WHERE Status = '00')
Order By TI.ItemTypeCode, TI.Identifier , ItemNM, CHK
mapper.insert:
Insert Into XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST( SRType, SRID, SRCode, ProjectID, Subject, Description, ItemTypeCode, SRArea1, SRArea2, SRArea3, Category, SubCategory, Priority, Reason, Status, RegUserID, RegTeamID, RegDT, RequestUserID, RequestTeamID, ReqDueDate, ReceiptUserID, ReceiptTeamID, DueDate, CompletionDT, CompanyID, ITSMIF, Proposal, DefWFID ,CustGRNo ,ClientID ,ESType ,ProcPathID ,ProcInstNo ,Opinion ,ProcRoleTP ,isPublic ,ResponseUserID ,ResponseTeamID )Values( #{srType}, #{srID}, #{srCode}, #{projectID}, #{subject}, #{description}, #{itemTypeCode}, #{srArea1}, #{srArea2}, #{srArea3}, #{category}, #{subCategory}, #{priority}, #{srReason}, #{status}, #{regUserID}, #{regTeamID}, GETDATE(), #{requestUserID}, #{requestTeamID},
#{reqdueDate},
GetDate(),
#{receiptUserID}, #{receiptTeamID},
#{dueDate},
Null,
GETDATE(),
Null,
#{companyID},
#{itsmIF},
'N',
#{proposal}
'00'
, #{defWFID} ,#{custGRNo} ,#{clientID} ,#{esType} ,#{procPathID} ,#{ProcInstNo} ,#{opinion} ,#{procRoleTP} ,#{isPublic} ,#{responseUserID} ,#{responseTeamID} )
mapper.select: SELECT ISNULL(MAX(ProcInstNo), 'PROC000001') AS MAXID FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_PROC_INST

Select TI.ItemID, TI.AuthorID, TI.OwnerTeamID From XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT TE LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI ON TI.ItemID = TE.ObjectID Where TE.ModelID = #{procPathID} And TE.CategoryCode = 'MOJ' AND TI.Identifier = #{status}
Select SRArea, RoleType, ProcessType, ProposalOption, ProcPathID, MailOption From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_CAT Where SRCatID = #{srCatID} And SRType = #{srType}
Select SRArea, RoleType, ProcessType, ProposalOption, ProcPathID, MailOption From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_CAT_CFG Where SRCatID = #{srCatID} And SRType = #{srType} And ClientID = #{customerNo}
mapper.update:
Update XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST SET SRType = #{srType}, ProjectID = #{projectID}, Comment = #{comment}, SRArea1 = #{srArea1}, SRArea2 = #{srArea2}, ReceiptUserID = #{receiptUserID}, ReceiptTeamID = #{receiptTeamID}, Category = #{category}, SubCategory = #{subCategory}, Priority = #{priority}, DueDate = #{dueDate},
Status = XBOLTAPP.fn_GetSRNextEventCode(#{srID}),
Status = #{status},
CompletionDT = GETDATE(),
ITSMIF = #{itsmIF}, Proposal = #{proposal}, Classification = #{classification}, CurWFInstanceID = #{curWFInstanceID}, ProcPathID = #{procPathID}, CompletionDT = GetDate(), Blocked = #{blocked}, ItemTypeCode = #{itemTypeCode}, SRArea3 = #{srArea3}, Reason = #{srReason}, ResponseTeamID = #{responseTeamID}, subject = #{subject}, description = #{description}, ProcRoleTP = #{procRoleTP}, ClientID = #{clientID}, isPublic = #{isPublic}, REQ_DEPT_APP_OPIN = #{REQ_DEPT_APP_OPIN}, LastUpdated = GETDATE(), LastUser = #{lastUser} Where SRID = #{srID}
mapper.select: SELECT ISNULL(MAX(SRID)+1, 1) AS SRID FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST
SELECT TOP 1 SRCode FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST Where subString(SRCode, 3,6) = #{thisYmd} order by SRID DESC
Select RequestUserID From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST Where SRID = #{srID}
Select ISNULL(CONVERT(char(10),DueDate, 21),'') AS SRDueDate From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST Where SRID = #{srID}
Select ISNULL(SCAT2.FixedPath,'N') AS FixedPath From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST ESM Left Outer Join XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_CAT SCAT2 on SCAT2.SRCatID = ESM.SubCategory Where SRID = #{srID}
Select XBOLTAPP.fn_GetStartEventCode(#{srID}, #{procPathID}) AS StartEventCode
Select XBOLTAPP.fn_GetNextEventCode(#{srID}, #{status}) AS NextEventCode
Select MemberID, RoleType From XBOLTADM.TB_MY_ITEM Where ItemID = #{SRArea} AND AssignmentType = 'SRROLETP' AND Assigned = 1
Select XBOLTAPP.fn_getESPAttrLovList(#{srID}, #{srType}, #{attrTypeCode}, #{customerNo}) AS searchLovCodes

SELECT Row_Number() OVER(ORDER BY TE.SortNum, TI.IDENTIFIER) AS RNUM, TI.Identifier FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST TSC INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT TE ON TSC.ProcPathID = TE.ModelID INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI ON TE.ObjectID = TI.ItemID And TE.ClassCode = #{itemClassCode} WHERE TSC.SRID = #{srID} And ISNULL(TI.IDENTIFIER,'') != ''

SELECT Distinct ESM.CompanyID AS CODE, TMT.Name AS NAME FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST ESM Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT ON ESM.CompanyID = TMT.TeamID AND TMT.LanguageID = #{languageID} Where ESM.SRType = #{srType} ORDER BY TMT.NAME
Select XBOLTADM.fn_GetSuperiorItemByClass(#{itemID}, #{classCode})

Select Distinct TI.ItemTypeCode AS CODE, TD.Name AS NAME From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST ESM Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI ON ESM.SRArea3 = TI.ItemID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD ON TI.ItemTypeCode = TD.TypeCode AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} Where SRArea3 IS NOT NULL
And TI.ItemTypeCode = #{itemTypeCode}
mapper.insert: Insert Into XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_CXN( SRCxnCat, FromSRID, ToSRID, Status, Creator, CreationTime )Values( #{srCxnCat}, #{fromSRID}, #{toSRID}, #{status}, #{creator}, getDate() )
mapper.select: Select SRID, Category, SRType, Proposal , ReceiptUserID, Subject, RequestUserID , RequestTeamID, SubCategory , RegUserID, RegTeamID, Status , ProcRoleTP, SRArea1, SRArea2 From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST Where SRID = #{srID}
mapper.update:
Update XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST SET LastUpdated = GETDATE(), LastUser = #{lastUser},
Status = #{status},
DueDate = #{DueDate},
CompletionDT = GETDATE()
CompletionDT = Null
Where SRID = #{srID}
mapper.select: SELECT ITM.Identifier, TIA.PlainText, TE.Dashed AS Dashed FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT TE LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TE.ObjectID = TIA.ItemID and TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM ON TE.link = ITM.ItemID WHERE TE.ModelID = #{modelID} Order By TE.DisplaySeq, TE.ElementID

Select 'SRArea'+CAST(TSA.Level as VARCHAR) AS CODE, TD.Name AS NAME From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_AREA TSA Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD ON TD.TypeCode = TSA.ItemClassCode And TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} And TD.Category = 'CLS' Where SRTypeCode = #{srType} Order By TSA.Level ASC

Select Top 1 MYITM.MemberID AS UserID, TM.Name, TM.TeamID As TeamID, TXT.Name AS TeamName From XBOLTADM.TB_MY_ITEM MYITM Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM ON TM.MemberID = MYITM.MemberID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TXT ON TXT.TeamID = TM.TeamID And TXT.LanguageID = #{languageID} Where MYITM.ItemID = #{srArea} and MYITM.RoleType = #{RoleType} and MYITM.AssignmentType = 'SRROLETP' and MYITM.Assigned = '1' Order By MYITM.OrderNum

Select Top 1500 Row_Number()OVER(ORDER BY SRCODE ) as RNUM, SRCode, SRSTSNM, SRReqTeamNM, SRReceiptTeamNM, CRReceiptTeamNM, Domain, System, CategoryNM, SubCategoryNM, SRRegDT, SRRDD, SRDueDate, SRCompletionDT, MinSRRCVDT, MaxSRRCVDT, SRRCVCount, SRPOINT, MinCSRDT, MaxAPRVDT, CSRCount, APRVCount, MinCRRegDT, MaxCRRDD, MaxCRDueDate, MinCRReceiptDT, maxCRCompletionDT, CRCount, ProjectID From XBOLTADM.OLM_SRSUMMARY_VIEW
CONVERT(varchar(10), SRRegDT, 120) BETWEEN #{srRegStartDT} AND #{srRegEndDT}

SELECT ESM.YEAR year FROM ( SELECT
YEAR(CONVERT(DATETIME,CompletionDT)) as YEAR
YEAR(CONVERT(DATETIME,RegDT)) as YEAR
FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST WHERE STATUS = #{status} )ESM GROUP BY ESM.YEAR
{CALL XBOLTADM.${dbFuncCode} (#{SRID}) }

SELECT CMST.CustomerNo AS CODE , TMT.Name AS NAME FROM XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST CMST WITH(NOLOCK) INNER Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TM WITH(NOLOCK) on CMST.TeamID = TM.TeamID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT on CMST.TeamID = TMT.TeamID AND TMT.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE CMST.CustLvl = 'C'
And CMST.CustomerNo in ( SELECT ClientID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_PJT_MEMBER_REL TPMR on TP.ProjectID = TPMR.ProjectID Where TPMR.MemberID = #{userID} And TP.ProjectType = 'CSR' )
AND CMST.TeamID NOT IN (${notCompanyIDs})
ORDER BY TM.RefTeamCode, NAME
Select TOP 1 receiptUserID, receiptTeamID FROM XBOLTAPP.fn_getSRReceiver() ORDER BY nowcnt ASC , nowcnt2 ASC, newid()
Select XBOLTAPP.fn_getESPProcRoleTP(#{srID},#{status},#{clientID}) AS ReceiptUserID
Select FltpCode, Name From XBOLTAPP.fn_getESPActivityFileCheckList(#{srID},#{status},#{clientID},#{SRAT0004},#{languageID})

SELECT EST.SRTypeCode AS CODE , TD.Name AS NAME FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_TYPE EST WITH(NOLOCK) Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD WITH(NOLOCK) ON EST.SRTypeCode = TD.TypeCode AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TD.Category = 'SRTP' WHERE EST.ESTypeCode = #{esType}
AND EST.SRTypeCode NOT IN (${notInSRTypeList})
AND EST.SRTypeCode IN ( SELECT SRTYPE FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_CAT_CFG WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CLIENTID = #{customerNo} GROUP BY SRTYPE )
ORDER BY NAME

Select MYITM.MemberID AS CODE, TM.Name AS NAME From XBOLTADM.TB_MY_ITEM MYITM Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM ON TM.MemberID = MYITM.MemberID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TXT ON TXT.TeamID = TM.TeamID And TXT.LanguageID = #{languageID} Where MYITM.ItemID = #{srArea} and MYITM.RoleType = #{RoleType} and MYITM.AssignmentType = 'SRROLETP' and MYITM.Assigned = '1' Order By MYITM.OrderNum
Select RNUM, TypeCode, StsName FROM XBOLTAPP.fn_GetESPProcStatusList(#{srID},#{status},#{languageID},#{sortNum}) ORDER BY RNUM
SELECT ElementID, SRNextStatus , SRNextSpePgrVarFilter, SRParameter , NextSortNum FROM XBOLTAPP.fn_GetESPNextEventList(#{srID},#{status},#{languageID},#{resultParameter},#{rulePass},#{sortNum})
Select Status From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST Where SRID = #{srID}
Select ProcRoleTP From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST Where SRID = #{srID}
SELECT SpeCode FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE ActivityLogID = #{activityLogID}

Select T.SortNum, T.AttrTypeCode, T.Name, T.PlainText,T.LovCode , T.DataType, T.Style, T.Domain, T.IsComLang, T.HTML, T.Mandatory, T.Editable, T.AreaHeight , T.RowNum, T.ColumnNum, T.SubAttrTypeCode, T.VarFilter, T.CtrlType
, T.AttrTypeCode2, T.Name2, T.PlainText2 , T.LovCode2, T.DataType2, T.Style2, T.Domain2, T.IsComLang2, T.HTML2 , T.Mandatory2, T.Editable2, T.AreaHeight2 , T.RowNum2, T.ColumnNum2, T.SubAttrTypeCode2, T.VarFilter2, T.CtrlType2 From (
Select EAAT.SortNum, EAAT.AttrTypeCode, TD.Name , Case TAT.DataType When 'MLOV' Then '' When 'MBR' Then '' Else ESA.Value End AS PlainText , Case TAT.DataType When 'MLOV' Then '' When 'MBR' Then '' ELSE ESA.LovCode End AS LovCode , TAT.DataType, TAT.Style, TAT.Domain, TAT.IsComLang, TAT.HTML, EAAT.Mandatory, EAAT.Editable , ISNULL(EAAT.AreaHeight, 20) AS AreaHeight , EAAT.RowNum, EAAT.ColumnNum, TAT.SubAttrTypeCode, EAAT.VarFilter, EAAT.CtrlType
, EAAT2.AttrTypeCode AS AttrTypeCode2, TD2.Name AS Name2 , Case TAT2.DataType When 'MLOV' Then '' When 'MBR' Then '' Else ESA2.Value End AS PlainText2 , Case TAT2.DataType When 'MLOV' Then '' When 'MBR' Then '' ELSE ESA2.LovCode End AS LovCode2 , TAT2.DataType AS DataType2, TAT2.Style AS Style2, TAT2.Domain AS Domain2, TAT2.IsComLang AS IsComLang2, TAT2.HTML AS HTML2 , EAAT2.Mandatory AS Mandatory2, EAAT2.Editable AS Editable2 , ISNULL(EAAT2.AreaHeight,20) AS AreaHeight2 , EAAT2.RowNum AS RowNum2, EAAT2.ColumnNum AS ColumnNum2, TAT2.SubAttrTypeCode AS SubAttrTypeCode2, EAAT2.VarFilter AS VarFilter2, EAAT2.CtrlType AS CtrlType2
From XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_ATTR_TYPE EAAT WITH(NOLOCK) Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE TAT WITH(NOLOCK) ON TAT.AttrTypeCode = EAAT.AttrTypeCode Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD WITH(NOLOCK) ON TD.TypeCode = TAT.AttrTypeCode And TD.LanguageID = #{languageID}
Left Outer Join XBOLTAPP.ESM_SCR_ATTR ESA WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESA.SCRID = #{scrID} And ESA.AttrTypeCode = EAAT.AttrTypeCode
Left Outer Join XBOLTAPP.ESM_WKS_ATTR ESA WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESA.SRID = #{srID} And ESA.AttrTypeCode = EAAT.AttrTypeCode
Left Outer Join XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_ATTR ESA WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESA.SRID = #{srID} And ESA.AttrTypeCode = EAAT.AttrTypeCode
Left Outer Join XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_ATTR_TYPE EAAT2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON EAAT2.SpeCode = #{speCode} And EAAT2.RowNum = EAAT.RowNum And EAAT2.ColumnNum = 2 And EAAT2.SRType = #{srType}
And ISNULL(EAAT2.Invisible,'') != '1'
Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE TAT2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TAT2.AttrTypeCode = EAAT2.AttrTypeCode Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TD2.TypeCode = TAT2.AttrTypeCode And TD2.LanguageID = #{languageID}
Left Outer Join XBOLTAPP.ESM_SCR_ATTR ESA2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESA2.SCRID = #{scrID} And ESA2.AttrTypeCode = EAAT2.AttrTypeCode
Left Outer Join XBOLTAPP.ESM_WKS_ATTR ESA2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESA2.SRID = #{srID} And ESA2.AttrTypeCode = EAAT2.AttrTypeCode
Left Outer Join XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_ATTR ESA2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESA2.SRID = #{srID} And ESA2.AttrTypeCode = EAAT2.AttrTypeCode
Where EAAT.SpeCode = #{speCode} And EAAT.DocCategory = #{docCategory} AND ISNULL(EAAT.ColumnNum,'') != 2 And EAAT.SRType = #{srType}
And ISNULL(EAAT.Invisible,'') != '1'
) T Group By T.SortNum, T.AttrTypeCode, T.Name, T.PlainText,T.LovCode, T.DataType, T.Style, T.Domain, T.IsComLang, T.HTML, T.Mandatory, T.Editable, T.AreaHeight , T.RowNum, T.ColumnNum, T.SubAttrTypeCode, T.VarFilter, T.CtrlType , T.AttrTypeCode2, T.Name2 , T.PlainText2 , T.LovCode2, T.DataType2, T.Style2, T.Domain2, T.IsComLang2, T.HTML2 , T.Mandatory2, T.Editable2, T.AreaHeight2 , T.RowNum2, T.ColumnNum2, T.SubAttrTypeCode2, T.VarFilter2, T.CtrlType2 Order by T.SortNum ASC

SELECT TATL.LovCode AS CODE, TATL.Value AS NAME, TATL.AttrTypeCode, TATL.LanguageID, ESA.LovCode AS LovCode FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL WITH(NOLOCK)
Left Outer Join XBOLTAPP.ESM_SCR_ATTR ESA WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESA.AttrTypeCode = TATL.AttrTypeCode And ESA.SCRID = #{scrID} And ESA.LovCode = TATL.LovCode
Left Outer Join XBOLTAPP.ESM_WKS_ATTR ESA WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESA.AttrTypeCode = TATL.AttrTypeCode And ESA.SRID = #{srID} And ESA.LovCode = TATL.LovCode
Left Outer Join XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_ATTR ESA WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESA.AttrTypeCode = TATL.AttrTypeCode And ESA.SRID = #{srID} And ESA.LovCode = TATL.LovCode
WHERE TATL.AttrTypeCode = #{attrTypeCode} AND TATL.LanguageID = #{languageID}
Select SRStartEventCode , SortNum FROM XBOLTAPP.fn_GetESPStartEventCode(#{srID}, #{procPathID}, #{sortNum})
SELECT TOP 1 SortNum FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE PID = #{srID} AND SpeCode = #{status} ORDER BY SEQ DESC
Select receiptUserID ,receiptUserLoginID ,receiptUserName, receiptTelNum, receiptTeamCode, receiptTeamName FROM XBOLTAPP.fn_GetESPEmailReceiverList(#{srID}, #{emailCode}, #{type}, #{languageID})

SELECT Row_Number()OVER(ORDER BY EAL.ActivityLogID ASC) as RNUM, SRID, EAL.SpeCode id, EAL.SpeCode, ISNULL(ATR.PlainText,'') AS Name, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT WORK_DATE) >= 2 THEN FORMAT(MIN(WORK_DATE), 'yyyy-MM-dd') + ' ~ ' + FORMAT(MAX(WORK_DATE), 'yyyy-MM-dd') ELSE FORMAT(MIN(WORK_DATE), 'yyyy-MM-dd') END AS WORK_DATE, SUM(EMR.BUSINESS_HOURS) AS BH, SUM(EMR.OVERTIME) AS OT, SUM(EMR.BUSINESS_HOURS) + SUM(EMR.OVERTIME) AS Total
FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_MBR_RCD EMR WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL WITH(NOLOCK) ON EMR.SRID = EAL.PID AND EMR.SpeCode = EAL.SpeCode LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM WITH(NOLOCK) ON ITM.Identifier = EAL.SpeCode LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR ATR WITH(NOLOCK) ON ATR.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATR.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND ATR.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE SRID = #{srID} AND (EAL.PID IS NULL OR EAL.Status != '07') GROUP BY SRID, EAL.SpeCode, ATR.PlainText, EAL.ActivityLogID

SELECT '' AS RNUM, EMR.SpeCode AS parent, EMR.MemberID, FORMAT(EMR.WORK_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd') WORK_DATE, EMR.BUSINESS_HOURS BH, EMR.OVERTIME OT, EMR.BUSINESS_HOURS + EMR.OVERTIME AS Total, ISNULL(MBR.Name,'') AS Name, MBR.MemberID, MBR.TeamID, ISNULL(TT.Name,'') AS TeamName, ESM.RoleDescription FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_MBR_RCD EMR WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER MBR WITH(NOLOCK) ON MBR.MemberID = EMR.MemberID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TT WITH(NOLOCK) ON MBR.TeamID = TT.TeamID AND TT.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MBR ESM WITH(NOLOCK) ON EMR.MemberID = ESM.MemberID And EMR.SpeCode = ESM.SpeCode And ESM.SRID = EMR.SRID WHERE EMR.SRID = #{srID} ORDER BY parent , WORK_DATE
Select Inhouse From XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM Where ClientID = #{customerNo} AND TeamType = '2'

SELECT ESA.AttrTypeCode, ESA.Value FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_ATTR_TYPE EAAT LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_ATTR ESA ON EAAT.AttrTypeCode = ESA.AttrTypeCode WHERE EAAT.SRType = #{srType} AND EAAT.SpeCode = #{speCode} AND EAAT.Invisible = 1 AND EAAT.Editable = 0 AND ESA.SRID = #{srID} GROUP BY ESA.AttrTypeCode, ESA.Value

SELECT TOP 1 CASE WHEN TAT.DataType = 'LOV' OR TAT.DataType = 'MLOV' THEN ESA.LovCode ELSE ESA.Value END AS Value FROM xboltapp.ESM_SR_ATTR ESA LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE TAT ON TAT.AttrTypeCode = ESA.AttrTypeCode WHERE ESA.SRID = #{srID} AND ESA.AttrTypeCode = #{attrTypeCode} AND ESA.SpeCode != #{speCode} ORDER BY ESA.Seq DESC

Select ESM.RequestUserID AS MemberID, TM.Name AS Name, TMT.Name AS TeamName From XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST ESM Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM ON TM.MemberID = ESM.RequestUserID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT ON TMT.TeamID = ESM.RequestTeamId And TMT.LanguageID = #{languageID} Where ESM.SRID = #{srID}

WITH Table1 AS ( Select EFA.FltpCode AS CODE, TD.Name AS NAME From XBOLTAPP.ESM_FLTP_ALLOC EFA Left Outer join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD ON TD.TypeCode = EFA.FltpCode And TD.LanguageID =#{languageID} Where EFA.SRTypeCode = #{srType} And EFA.DocCategory = #{docCategory} And EFA.SpeCode = #{speCode} ),
Table2 AS ( Select TF.FltpCode AS CODE, TD.Name AS NAME From XBOLTADM.Tb_FLTP TF Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD ON TD.TypeCode = TF.FltpCode And TD.LanguageID =#{languageID} Where FltpCode = 'SRDOC' )
Select CODE, NAME From Table1 Union All Select CODE, NAME From Table2 Where NOT EXISTS (Select 1 From Table1)

WITH ProcStatusList AS ( SELECT Rnum SortNum, TypeCode, Stsname, MIN(CASE WHEN typecode = #{status} THEN rnum END) OVER () AS StartRnum, MAX(rnum) OVER () AS EndRnum FROM xboltapp.fn_GetESPProcStatusList(#{srID},#{status},#{languageID},#{sortNum}) WHERE TypeCode NOT IN ('ZSPE00','ACM0009') ) SELECT Row_Number() OVER(ORDER BY PSL.SortNum ) AS Rnum , PSL.SortNum, PSL.TypeCode As SpeCode, PSL.Stsname , ESA.Value As SRAT0069, EAL.EndTime, EAL.ActorID, TM.Name + '('+ISNULL(TMT.Name,'-')+'/'+ISNULL(TMT2.Name,'-')+')' As ReceiptUserNM , EAL.DocCategory FROM ProcStatusList PSL WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG EAL WITH(NOLOCK) ON EAL.PID = #{srID} AND EAL.SpeCode = PSL.TypeCode AND EAL.Seq = ( SELECT MAX(Seq) FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE SpeCode = PSL.TypeCode AND PID = #{srID} ) AND EAL.Status IN ('05','03','02') LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM WITH(NOLOCK) ON TM.MemberID = EAL.ActorID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT WITH(NOLOCK) ON TMT.TeamID = TM.CompanyID And TMT.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TMT2.TeamID = TM.TeamID And TMT2.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_ATTR ESA WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESA.AttrTypeCode = 'SRAT0069' AND ESA.SRID = #{srID} AND ESA.SpeCode = PSL.TypeCode
WHERE PSL.SortNum >= StartRnum AND PSL.SortNum <= EndRnum ORDER BY PSL.SortNum

Select Top 1000 Row_Number() OVER(ORDER BY TI.ItemTypeCode ASC, TI.Identifier ASC, TIA.PlainText ASC ) AS RNUM , 1 AS CHK , TI.Identifier , ISNULL(TIA.PlainText,'') As ItemNM , TDC.Name AS ClassName , TI.ClassCode , ISNULL(TM.Name,'') AS AuthorName , ISNULL(XBOLTADM.fn_GetMyAbsPathForList( TI.ItemID, #{languageID}),'') AS Path , TI.Status , TI.ItemID , TDS.Name AS StatusNM , TIP.ServiceItemID , ISNULL(TIP.Description, '') AS Description , Convert(nvarchar(20),TI.LastUpdated, 120) AS LastUpdated From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI WITH(NOLOCK) Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_Item_Attr TIA WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TDC WITH(NOLOCK) ON TDC.TypeCode = TI.ClassCode And TDC.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM WITH(NOLOCK) ON TI.AuthorID = TM.MemberID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_CLASS TCLS WITH(NOLOCK) ON TCLS.ItemClassCode = TI.ClassCode LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TDS WITH(NOLOCK) ON TI.Status = TDS.TypeCode AND TDS.Category = 'ITMSTS' AND TDS.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_SERVICE_ITEM TIP WITH(NOLOCK) ON TI.ItemID = TIP.ItemID Where TI.Deleted != 1 AND TI.CategoryCode = 'OJ'
AND TIP.DocumentID = #{srID} And TIP.ItemID IS NOT NULL
Order By TI.ItemTypeCode, TI.Identifier , ItemNM, CHK

Select Row_Number() OVER(ORDER BY MYITM.RoleType ) AS RNUM, MYITM.MemberID AS MemberID, TM.Name AS Name, TD.Name AS ProcRoleTPName, TXT.Name AS TeamName, TXT.TeamID, TXT2.Name AS CompanyName From XBOLTADM.TB_MY_ITEM MYITM WITH(NOLOCK) Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM WITH(NOLOCK) ON TM.MemberID = MYITM.MemberID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TXT WITH(NOLOCK) ON TXT.TeamID = TM.TeamID And TXT.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TXT2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TXT2.TeamID = TM.CompanyID And TXT2.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD WITH(NOLOCK) ON TD.TypeCode = MYITM.RoleType AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} Where MYITM.ItemID = #{srArea} and MYITM.AssignmentType = 'SRROLETP' and MYITM.Assigned = '1' Order By MYITM.RoleType ASC

SELECT TIA.PlainText NAME , TI.ItemID CODE FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TT1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TT1.TeamID = #{companyID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TT2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TT2.RefTeamCode = TT1.TeamCode AND TT2.TeamType = 2 LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TT3 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TT3.TeamID = #{deptID} WHERE TI.ClientID = TT2.ClientID AND TI.Deleted = 0 AND TI.ItemTypeCode = 'OJ00004' AND TI.ItemID IN ( SELECT DISTINCT ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MY_ITEM WHERE MemberID IN ( SELECT MemberID FROM XBOLTDLM.ITUSER_DEPT_INFO WHERE CD_DEPT = TT3.TeamCode ) ) ORDER BY TIA.PlainText

SELECT T.RowNum id, T.SRAreaName, T.RoleMemberName, T.RoleName, T.SRTypeName FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TI.ItemID, ORT.ProcessType) AS RowNum, TIA.PlainText SRAreaName ,STRING_AGG(IDI.USER_NM, ',') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY IDI.USER_NM) AS RoleMemberName , TD.Name RoleName , TD2.Name SRTypeName, TMI.RoleType FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001'
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TT1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TT1.TeamID = #{companyID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TT2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TT2.RefTeamCode = TT1.TeamCode AND TT2.TeamType = 2
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TT3 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TT3.TeamID = #{deptID}
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MY_ITEM TMI WITH(NOLOCK) ON TMI.ItemID = TI.ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTDLM.ITUSER_DEPT_INFO IDI WITH(NOLOCK) ON IDI.MemberID = TMI.MemberID AND IDI.CORP_ID = TT1.TeamCode AND IDI.CD_DEPT = TT3.TeamCode LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD WITH(NOLOCK) ON TD.TypeCode = TMI.RoleType AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TD.Category = 'SRROLETP' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_OLM_ROLE_TYPE ORT WITH(NOLOCK) ON ORT.RoleTypeCode = TMI.RoleType LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TD2.TypeCode = ORT.ProcessType AND TD2.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TD2.Category = 'SRTP' WHERE TI.Deleted = 0 AND TI.ClientID = TT2.ClientID AND TI.ItemTypeCode = 'OJ00004' AND TI.ClassCode IN ( 'CL04001','CL04002') AND TI.ItemID IN ( SELECT DISTINCT ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MY_ITEM WHERE MemberID IN ( SELECT MemberID FROM XBOLTDLM.ITUSER_DEPT_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND CORP_ID = TT1.TeamCode AND CD_DEPT = TT3.TeamCode ) ) AND TI.ItemID = #{srArea} AND TMI.RoleType = #{roleType} AND ORT.ProcessType = #{srType} GROUP BY TIA.PlainText ,TD.Name , TD2.Name, TMI.RoleType, TI.ItemID , ORT.ProcessType )T
Select top 1 FltpCode From XBOLTAPP.ESM_FLTP_ALLOC Where SpeCode = #{speCode}
Select top 1 SpeCode From XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG Where PID = #{PID} Order by ActivityLogID DESC
